title: Dual chamber microbial fuel cell wastewater treatment with carbon felt anodes
abstract_text: A dual chamber microbial fuel cell using carbon felt anodes, Pt/C on carbon cloth cathodes, Nafion separator, and acetate wastewater reached power density of 850 mW/m2, current density of 1.2 A/m2, COD removal of 82%, coulombic efficiency of 46%, and voltage of 620 mV at pH 7 and 30 C. Membrane fouling, electrode cost, and scale-up maintenance remained challenges for pilot implementation.
